raw_transcript: Good evening, Mr. Thompson. I'm Dr. Chen. I've been reviewing your chart, and it looks like you've been struggling with some persistent reflux for a long time. I see you're on high-dose Omeprazole. Can you tell me more about what's been happening lately?
final_corrected_note: Good evening, Mr. Thompson. I'm Dr. Chen. I've been reviewing your chart, and it looks like you've been struggling with some persistent reflux for a long time. I see you're on high-dose Omeprazole. Can you tell me more about what's been happening lately?
